revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23993722414|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:出雲乃伊波比神社 (寄居町)]]
'''Izumono Iwai Shrine''' (出雲乃伊波比神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located along the {{ill|Arakawa River (Kantō)|en|Arakawa River (Kantō)|qid=Q625465|lt=Arakawa River (Kantō)|1=Arakawa River (Kantō)}} in {{ill|Akahama|ja|赤浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akahama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yorii, Saitama|en|Yorii, Saitama|qid=Q961604|lt=Yorii|1=Yorii, Saitama}}, {{ill|Ōsato District, Saitama|en|Ōsato District, Saitama|qid=Q1075196|lt=Ōsato District|1=Ōsato District, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. The enshrined deity is {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}. It is one of the candidate sites for the {{ill|Izumono Iwai Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|出雲乃伊波比神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumono Iwai Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 出雲乃伊波比神社|1=Izumo no Iwai Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q104539297}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a small shrine (式内小社) of {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|qid=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}}’s {{ill|Obusuma District|ja|男衾郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Obusuma District|1=Obusuma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11578175}}. The former shrine Rank was that of a village shrine (郷社).
== History ==
Originally, the shrine was located in {{ill|Hatakeyama, Kawamoto Village|ja|川本村畠山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatakeyama, Kawamoto Village|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Due to the loss of ancient records in fires and floods, the exact founding date is unknown. During the {{ill|Former Nine Years' War|en|Former Nine Years' War|qid=Q1187448|lt=Zenkunen War|1=Former Nine Years' War}} (1052–1057) in the {{ill|Tengi|en|Tengi|qid=Q1193591|lt=Tenki era|1=Tengi}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|en|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|qid=Q3082851|lt=Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|1=Minamoto no Yoriyoshi}} prayed for victory at this shrine while on his way to {{ill|Mutsu Province|en|Mutsu Province|qid=Q907389|lt=Mutsu Province|1=Mutsu Province}} and dedicated a white flag. This event led to the shrine being renamed "Shirahata Hachiman Shrine" (白籏八幡社).
In {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1143910|lt=Kōji 3|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} (1557), the shrine was relocated to {{ill|Shimogōchi, Akahama Village|ja|赤浜村下河内|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogōchi, Akahama Village|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, known as "Hachimanzuka." Later, in {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (1580), a major flood of the Arakawa River forced the shrine to move along with local residents to its current location.
In the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}, the shrine reverted to its original name, "Izumono Iwai Shrine."<ref name="Shrine Noticeboard">Shrine noticeboard (July 2019)</ref>
=== Enshrined Deities ===
* '''Main deity:''' {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|須佐之男命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} * '''Secondary deities:''' ** {{ill|Mihotsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|三穂津姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mihotsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三穂津姫}} ** {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}} (as {{ill|Hondawake no Mikoto|ja|誉田別命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}}) ** {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|1=Ame-no-Koyane|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}} ** {{ill|Ame-no-Futodama-no-Mikoto|ja|天太玉命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Futodama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to フトダマ|1=Futodama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11059539}} ** {{ill|Ame-no-Hohi-no-Mikoto|ja|天穂日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hohi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10940685}}
=== Shrine Rank ===
* '''November, Meiji 4 (1871):''' Promoted to village shrine (村社) * '''June 24, Meiji 32 (1899):''' Promoted to district shrine (郷社)
== Auxiliary Shrines ==
=== Sessha (Associated Shrines) ===
* '''Yasaka Shrine''' - Main deity: Susanoo-no-Mikoto * '''Myōken Shrine''' - Main deity: {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|八意思兼命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オモイカネ}}
=== Massha (Subordinate Shrines) ===
* '''Ishimiya Yasaka Shrine''' * '''Yama Shrine''' * '''Asama Ōkami''' - Enshrined in {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en era|1=Man'en}} (1860) * '''Amaterasu Ōmikami''' - Transferred from {{ill|Jōraku-ji|ja|常楽寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōraku-ji|1=Joraku-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11481414}} on October 9, Meiji 3 (1870) * '''Haruna Shrine''' * '''Shrines to:''' {{ill|Kōkage Ōkami|ja|蚕影大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōkage Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579317|1=Q135579317}}, {{ill|Mitsumine Ōkami|ja|三峰大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsumine Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579318|1=Q135579318}}, {{ill|Kohō Ōkami|ja|古峰大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kohō Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579319|1=Q135579319}}, {{ill|Tenman Shrine|ja|天満社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天満宮|1=Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q798838}}, {{ill|Atago Ōkami|ja|愛宕大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 愛宕信仰|1=Atago Faith|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11493823}}, {{ill|Hakusan Ōkami|ja|白山大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 白山権現|1=Hakusan Gongen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11579578}}, {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|伊奈利社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
<gallery widths="200px" heights="150px"> File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Yasaka-sha.JPG|Yasaka Shrine, Ishimiya Yasaka Shrine File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Myoken-sha.JPG|Myōken Shrine File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Sesha.JPG|Subordinate shrines (Kōkage Ōkami, Mitsumine Ōkami, Kohō Ōkami, Tenman Shrine, Atago Ōkami, Hakusan Ōkami, Inari Shrine) </gallery>
<gallery widths="150px" heights="200px"> File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Asama-Okami.JPG|Asama Ōkami File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Amaterasu-Okami.JPG|Amaterasu Ōmikami File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Haruna-sha.JPG|Haruna Shrine </gallery>
== Festivals ==
* '''New Year's Festival (歳旦祭):''' January 1 * '''Setsubun Festival (節分祭):''' February 3 * '''Kinensai & Atago Festival (祈年祭・愛宕祭):''' February 23 * '''Prayers for New Students (入学児童祈願祭):''' Late March * '''Yasaka Shrine Festival (末社八坂社祭):''' Mid-July (Sunday) * '''Grand Festival (大祭):''' October 19 * '''Niinamesai & Atago Festival (新嘗祭・愛宕祭):''' October 23 * '''Onuki Festival (大抜祭):''' December 31
== Grounds ==
<gallery widths="200"> File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Worship Hall.JPG|Worship Hall (拝殿) File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Worship Hall Tablet.JPG|Plaque of the Worship Hall File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Main hall.JPG|Main Hall (本殿) File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Torii.JPG|Torii Gate File:Izumonoiwai-jinja Torii Tablet.JPG|Plaque on the Torii Gate </gallery>
== Access ==
* 20-minute walk from {{ill|Obusuma Station|en|Obusuma Station|qid=Q7075604|lt=Obusuma Station|1=Obusuma Station}} on the {{ill|Tōbu Tōjō Line|ja|東武東上線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōbu Tōjō Line|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東武東上本線|1=Tōbu Tōjō Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1040703}}
== References ==
{{Reflist}}
== See Also ==
